query:
SELECT
            cp.role::text as "role?",
            c.channel_type::text as "channel_type!",
            c.org_id as "org_id?"
        FROM comms_channels c
        LEFT JOIN comms_channel_participants cp
            ON cp.channel_id = c.id AND cp.user_id = $2 AND cp.left_at IS NULL
        WHERE c.id = $1
